rows.label: tlk70000046_05_msg0001
rows.name:
Turns out Jelyco was deadly
serious about wiping out
the Bloody Lobsters.

rows.label: tlk70000046_05_msg0002
rows.name:
I tried to stop him, saying
I'm retired now, and that
this is far too reckless...

rows.label: tlk70000046_05_msg0003
rows.name:
But he just responded by giving
me this twelve-step fitness regimen
and telling me to shape up.

rows.label: tlk70000046_05_msg0004
rows.name:
What is with him? Scary... If
it's a joke, make it clear. If
he's serious, do it better.

rows.label: tlk70000046_05_msg0005
rows.name:
Does he really expect me to atone
this way? Ask him again for me, would
you? I'm just not buying it...
